purpose: Freeze the current Node requirements, feedback, attachments, intake_plan_links, deletion and post-mutation AppSnapshot behavior for P06.

prerequisites.gate: P05 completion evidence, schema/checksum, Files policy and database owner lock must pass before a P06 writer opens a fixture copy.
prerequisites.copies: Node/sql.js accesses only a generator-owned sanitized OS-temporary database or caller-explicit sanitized copy. Go may open only a separately reset copy after Node closes.
prerequisites.failClosed: Never discover or open Electron userData, production autoplan.sqlite, a home-profile database, a real attachment root or an unapproved path.

representation.storageAndSnapshotNaming: snake_case intake rows inside the historical camelCase AppSnapshot envelope
representation.time: UTC new Date().toISOString() values with Z suffix
representation.presence: null, empty string and missing are distinct; empty collections remain present; unknown fields fail strict golden comparison

statusContract.draftInput: createAsDraft or draft truthy forces draft
statusContract.ipcCreate: supplied truthy status is persisted verbatim, otherwise open
statusContract.ipcUpdate: input.status ?? current.status ?? open; legacy IPC has no enum validation
statusContract.duplicateCandidate: every status except exactly closed blocks equivalent create
statusContract.linkedCompletion: all linked plans completed moves a non-terminal intake to completed; completed and closed remain terminal
statusContract.migrationRule: Preserve historical values on reads; new public mutations accept the frozen API enum and reject other values with a stable validation code.

defaultsAndNullability.requirementTitle: trim explicit title; otherwise first trimmed non-empty body line truncated to 80 UTF-16 code units; otherwise 未命名需求
defaultsAndNullability.feedbackTitle: trim explicit title; otherwise first trimmed non-empty body line truncated to 80 UTF-16 code units; otherwise 未命名反馈
defaultsAndNullability.updateTitle: input.title ?? titleFromBody(next body, fallback); omitted title is rederived, while explicit empty remains empty
defaultsAndNullability.acceptedAt: explicit UTC string or null in intake snapshot
defaultsAndNullability.failureFields: generate_fail_count is a finite number defaulting to 0; other generation failure fields are explicit value or null

order: derive values and frozen generation config
requirements:create.event: requirement.created: 需求 #<id> 已创建，等待循环扫描生成计划

feedback:create.event: feedback.created: 反馈 #<id> 已创建，等待循环扫描生成计划

feedback:update.requirementId: undefined preserves current nonzero id or null; any other falsy value clears; legacy truthy update is not ownership-validated

intake:accept.validation: strict requirement|feedback type, positive id and same-project row
intake:accept.effect: set accepted_at=updated_at to one new UTC value, do not change status, add <type>.accepted; repeated accept refreshes and records previousAcceptedAt
intake:accept.response: {targetType, intakeType, id, accepted_at}, followed by IPC AppSnapshot reread

intake:unaccept.effect: set accepted_at null and updated_at to a new UTC value, do not change status, add <type>.unaccepted; repeated unaccept succeeds
intake:unaccept.response: {targetType, intakeType, id, accepted_at:null}, followed by IPC AppSnapshot reread

duplicateRule.feedbackScope: same project_id and same nullable requirement_id group
normalization: CRLF and lone CR become LF
each line collapses non-newline whitespace runs to one ASCII space and is trimmed
lines are joined with LF and the whole value is trimmed
duplicateRule.equality: both normalized title and normalized body equal

error.name: DuplicateIntakeError
error.sideEffects: none: rejection precedes intake insert, attachments, event and autoRun

duplicateRule.legacyUpdateGap: requirements:update and feedback:update do not perform duplicate detection

requirementAssociation.create: falsy requirementId becomes null; otherwise the requirement must exist and have the same project_id

errors.message: 关联需求不属于当前项目

requirementAssociation.deleteRequirement: retain same-project feedback and set matching requirement_id to null with the deletion updated_at
requirementAssociation.legacyUpdateGap: feedback:update can write an unvalidated truthy requirement id. P06 must close this integrity/IDOR gap rather than reproduce it.

planLinks.input: positive plan id; phase_index defaults to input position starting at 1; phase_title is trimmed; sort by phase_index then plan_id; deduplicate by plan_id retaining first
planLinks.readOrder: phase_index ASC, plan_id ASC; project grouping first orders intake_type and intake_id
planLinks.legacySync: non-empty write stores the first normalized plan in linked_plan_id; deleting all links clears it; deleting one plan selects the first remaining phase only when legacy id referenced that plan
planLinks.fallback: when no link rows exist, a positive linked_plan_id appears as phase 1 with empty title and null link id/timestamps
planLinks.current: first non-empty status outside completed/interrupted/draft, else first non-completed, else first link
planLinks.legacyIntegrityGap: writeIntakePlanLinks does not prevalidate intake/plan existence or same-project ownership. P06 writes must reject missing or cross-project resources.

intake.beforeTransaction: load attachments/links and stop every linked existing plan operation; a later database rollback does not undo runtime stop
databaseBatch: delete each linked plan's tasks and plan row
intake.databaseAtomicity: one AppDatabase.runBatch BEGIN/COMMIT with rollback on any statement failure
afterCommit: best-effort attachment-file deletion within configured root
intake.deleted event with plan and cleanup summaries
intake.fileFailure: does not roll back committed rows; cleanup counts deleted/skipped/failed and plan failures become events

plan.behavior: stop operations; transactionally delete links, sync legacy ids to remaining first phase, delete tasks/plan/scan cache; retain all intakes; then best-effort file delete
plan.event: plan.deleted includes stopped/task counts, linked intake ids, plan-file result and keepIntakes=true

deletion.p06RecoveryBoundary: P06 persists post-commit file work. A committed database delete with pending or failed bytes cleanup must be reported as recoverable, never as complete success.

attachments.persistence: serial exclusive file copy/write, stat, SHA-256, then metadata INSERT
attachments.displayName: basename after slash normalization; empty/dot/dot-dot falls back
attachments.mime: declared type lowercased without parameters, otherwise small extension map, otherwise application/octet-stream
attachments.order: snapshot created_at DESC/id DESC; deletion inventory id ASC
legacyRisks: orphan if DB insert fails after file write
SELECT * snapshot exposes stored_path and hash
local path appears in prompt/protocol surfaces
best-effort delete has no operation journal or quarantine

snapshot.mutationReturn: successful create/update/delete/accept/unaccept rereads LoopService.snapshot(projectId); failures publish no success snapshot
snapshot.intake: SELECT intake.* plus legacy joined plan aliases, then normalize agent CLI, accepted_at, backend and generation failure fields
snapshot.linkedPlans: always an array of snake_case DTOs with explicit nulls
snapshot.noLink: linked_plans is empty and plan summary aliases are absent
snapshot.attachmentLegacyRisk: current Node snapshot SELECT * includes stored_path/hash; evidence only, not the P06 public DTO

mcp.list: same-project, optional open|completed|closed status, default limit 100/max 200, updated_at DESC/id DESC
mcp.create: requires non-empty trimmed title and body; default-title behavior is therefore IPC-only; attachments max 20 at this transport
mcp.response: camelCase detail/summary plus linkedPlans; create includes latest project intake, openable deep link and reduced snapshot counts
mcp.pathRisk: legacy MCP accepts path input; P06 allows it only for an explicitly local, project-bound caller after P05 Files policy authorization

errors.message: 关联需求不属于当前项目
需求/反馈 ID 无效
<需求|反馈>不存在或不属于当前项目
附件保存失败：无法生成唯一文件名

golden.comparison: strict deep compare of projected keys, types, null/missing, values and order; no unknown-field allowance
golden.safety: serial Node-only execution on a fresh sanitized OS-temporary database; sql.js closes before artifact commit; manifest records schema/fixture/database/attachment hashes
golden.handoff: Go may later open a separately reset copy only after Node closes and releases ownership
